strengths: 19+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and low-latency systems
Founder/entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) plus recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work
Strong communicator: conference talks, multi-day workshops, and open-source community leadership
concerns: No advanced degree or formal background in AI/ML; AI exposure is recent and tooling-focused, not recognized expertise
Career level is Senior/Staff IC — no evidence of Director-level scope, org-wide influence, or strategic advisory work
Limited demonstrated cloud platform strategy experience; cloud work is applied (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) rather than product/strategy leadership

key_factors.factor: Deep, broad engineering experience meeting 15-year bar

response.justification: The candidate comfortably clears the experience and technical-breadth bar, with genuine builder fluency, entrepreneurial history, and strong knowledge-sharing skills that map to the inspire-and-advise responsibilities. However, this role demands recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products and Director-level strategic influence; his AI work is early-stage agent tooling and his track record is strong senior/staff IC delivery rather than platform strategy or executive advisory. He is a credible staff-plus engineer but a stretch for a Principal AI Strategy position.
